## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between HockeyStack and GrowthX to align on content strategy and prioritize competitor comparison articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prioritize Calibre Mind and DreamData comparisons for HockeyStack](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [GrowthX to update existing content with enterprise positioning and refresh competitor comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [HockeyStack to review calibration blog for voice/tone and positioning accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide visibility into keyword rankings and optimization strategy for existing content](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

## Topics

### Content Prioritization and Competitor Focus

  - [Shift focus to Calibre Mind and DreamData comparisons, removing less relevant competitors](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Emir emphasized the need to prioritize DreamData and Calibre Mind keywords](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Aida to conduct keyword research and update Airtable with relevant comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Publishing of new comparison content to start next week after setup and generation](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)

### Existing Content Refresh Strategy

  - [GrowthX to own the process of updating existing content](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Aida to prepare a Notion doc outlining:](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [Current keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [Optimization targets](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [Methodology for updates](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Priority given to high-traffic articles (e.g., Calibre Mind Alternatives)](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Updates to include enterprise positioning and case study mentions (e.g., ActiveCampaign)](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

### Content Review and Approval Process

  - [Emir to be the primary reviewer for new and updated content](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [HockeyStack team to review the calibration blog for voice, tone, and positioning accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [GrowthX to highlight changes in Google Docs for efficient review](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)

### Technical Setup and Workflow Improvements

  - [CMS access granted to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Discussion on setting up an image generation pipeline for blog covers](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [GrowthX to connect with HockeyStack's in-house designers for asset sharing](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)

### Positioning and Documentation Concerns

  - [Emir noted inconsistencies in positioning across documents and Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Aida to review go-to-market assets and summarize key points for alignment](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Focus on accurately reflecting B2B SaaS and enterprise positioning in content](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to conduct keyword research for Calibre Mind and DreamData comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare Notion doc outlining content refresh strategy and keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [HockeyStack to review calibration blog and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [GrowthX to prioritize updating high-traffic articles (e.g., Calibre Mind Alternatives) early next week](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [Emir to add HockeyStack designer to Slack channel for image asset collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Aida to summarize key points from go-to-market assets for positioning alignment](https://fathom.video/share/zGynCauD7SH3HviDzKtWXDdsAU3zPM4a?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
